ingredients.item:
These popular crêpes are commonly made with rice flour colored with turmeric to get their distinctive appearance. The batter is spread evenly across a piping hot pan to create that sizzling sound, hence the name bánh xèo (which means “sizzling cake”).
SKILL LEVELModerate|YIELD16 crêpes

CRÊPES
3 cups (400 g) rice flour
⅓ teaspoon turmeric powder

½ teaspoon salt
3 cups (760 ml) water
1 ounce (28 g) scallion or leek (green part only), finely chopped

FILLING
2 pounds (907 g) assorted mushrooms (button, king oyster, beech, straw, shiitake, or oyster), stems trimmed
2 cups (480 ml) plus 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, divided

1 tablespoon minced scallion or leek (white part only)
½ teaspoon salt
1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder
ingredients.original:
These popular crêpes are commonly made with rice flour colored with turmeric to get their distinctive appearance. The batter is spread evenly across a piping hot pan to create that sizzling sound, hence the name bánh xèo (which means “sizzling cake”).
SKILL LEVELModerate|YIELD16 crêpes

CRÊPES
3 cups (400 g) rice flour
⅓ teaspoon turmeric powder

½ teaspoon salt
3 cups (760 ml) water
1 ounce (28 g) scallion or leek (green part only), finely chopped

FILLING
2 pounds (907 g) assorted mushrooms (button, king oyster, beech, straw, shiitake, or oyster), stems trimmed
2 cups (480 ml) plus 2 tablespoons vegetable oil, divided

1 tablespoon minced scallion or leek (white part only)
½ teaspoon salt
1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon vegan fish sauce or soy sauce
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon vegan fish sauce or soy sauce

ingredients.item:
FOR SERVING
1 pound (454 g) mustard greens or leaf lettuce
3½ ounces (100 g) fresh green herbs (mint, perilla, cilantro, and/or Asian basil leaves), chopped
ingredients.original:
FOR SERVING
1 pound (454 g) mustard greens or leaf lettuce
3½ ounces (100 g) fresh green herbs (mint, perilla, cilantro, and/or Asian basil leaves), chopped

ingredients.item: 1 medium cucumber, peeled, seeds removed, and cut lengthwise into 3-inch (7.5 cm) slices
ingredients.original: 1 medium cucumber, peeled, seeds removed, and cut lengthwise into 3-inch (7.5 cm) slices

ingredients.item: 1 medium green mango, peeled, seeds removed, and cut lengthwise into 3-inch (7.5 cm) slices
ingredients.original: 1 medium green mango, peeled, seeds removed, and cut lengthwise into 3-inch (7.5 cm) slices

ingredients.item: 1½ cups (320 ml) vegan fish dipping sauce
ingredients.original: 1½ cups (320 ml) vegan fish dipping sauce

ingredients.item: 1. MAKE THE CRÊPES In a large bowl, whisk rice flour, turmeric powder, salt, and water until well combined and batter is quite thin. Stir in finely chopped scallion and let sit for 30 minutes.
ingredients.original: 1. MAKE THE CRÊPES In a large bowl, whisk rice flour, turmeric powder, salt, and water until well combined and batter is quite thin. Stir in finely chopped scallion and let sit for 30 minutes.

ingredients.item: 2. MAKE THE FILLING Cut larger mushrooms into ½-inch (1 cm) thick slices and separate smaller ones into bite-size bundles. Rinse well and squeeze out excess water.
ingredients.original: 2. MAKE THE FILLING Cut larger mushrooms into ½-inch (1 cm) thick slices and separate smaller ones into bite-size bundles. Rinse well and squeeze out excess water.

ingredients.item: 3. Heat 2 tablespoons of the vegetable oil in a medium pan over medium-low heat. Add minced scallion and cook and stir until slightly golden brown (about 1 minute). Add mushrooms and season with salt, stock powder, and vegan fish sauce. Cook and stir until the mushrooms are wilted (about 3 minutes), and then remove pan from the heat.
ingredients.original: 3. Heat 2 tablespoons of the vegetable oil in a medium pan over medium-low heat. Add minced scallion and cook and stir until slightly golden brown (about 1 minute). Add mushrooms and season with salt, stock powder, and vegan fish sauce. Cook and stir until the mushrooms are wilted (about 3 minutes), and then remove pan from the heat.

ingredients.item: 4. Place an 8-inch (20 cm) cast-iron or heavy-bottomed skillet over medium heat. When hot, add 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil and swirl to evenly coat the pan. When oil starts to smoke, ladle ¼ cup (60 ml) of batter into the pan. It will start to sizzle immediately, so swirl the pan gently until mixture evenly covers the entire bottom. Spoon about ½ cup (35 g) of the cooked mushrooms and 1 ounce (28 g) of mung bean sprouts into the center of the crêpe, and then cover. When crêpe turns crispy and golden (about 3 minutes), use a heatproof spatula to fold it in half (Note), and then continue to cook for 30 more seconds. Use a spatula to carefully transfer to a cooling rack to drain. Repeat with remaining vegetable oil, batter, mushroom filling, and mung bean sprouts.
ingredients.original: 4. Place an 8-inch (20 cm) cast-iron or heavy-bottomed skillet over medium heat. When hot, add 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil and swirl to evenly coat the pan. When oil starts to smoke, ladle ¼ cup (60 ml) of batter into the pan. It will start to sizzle immediately, so swirl the pan gently until mixture evenly covers the entire bottom. Spoon about ½ cup (35 g) of the cooked mushrooms and 1 ounce (28 g) of mung bean sprouts into the center of the crêpe, and then cover. When crêpe turns crispy and golden (about 3 minutes), use a heatproof spatula to fold it in half (Note), and then continue to cook for 30 more seconds. Use a spatula to carefully transfer to a cooling rack to drain. Repeat with remaining vegetable oil, batter, mushroom filling, and mung bean sprouts.

ingredients.item: 5. FOR SERVING Cut the crêpes in half with kitchen scissors and place each half in the center of a leaf of mustard greens or lettuce. Top with the fresh green herbs, cucumber and green mango slices, and then roll it up. Serve with vegan fish dipping sauce.
ingredients.original: 5. FOR SERVING Cut the crêpes in half with kitchen scissors and place each half in the center of a leaf of mustard greens or lettuce. Top with the fresh green herbs, cucumber and green mango slices, and then roll it up. Serve with vegan fish dipping sauce.
